title: Complaints Management
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable customer-facing workshop for improving complaints management performance.
whyThisMatters: Complaints Management helps sales, marketing, and service teams improve complaints management through clearer conversations, stronger follow-through, and more consistent customer handling. Participants practise Principles of resolving complaints, Skills in Handling Complaints, and Verbal communication so they can apply the skills in real customer situations.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.
methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
